revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24618454543|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Antsukino- Shrine
| native_name = 足次山神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Antsukino- Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Antsukino- Shrine'''|足次山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bitchū Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11387310|ltq=Q11387310|qid=Q11387310|1=List of Shikinaisha in Bitchū Province}}
** Series ordinal: 16
** P155: {{ill|Ueno Shrine|lt=Ueno Shrine|qid=Q135041234|1=Ueno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q107297935|ltq=Q107297935|qid=Q107297935|1=Himesaka Kanachiana Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1047514|ltq=Q1047514|qid=Q1047514|1=Bitchū Province}}
* {{ill|Shitsuki District, Okayama|lt=Shitsuki district|en|Shitsuki District, Okayama|ja|後月郡|zh|後月郡|qid=Q8192347|1=Shitsuki District, Okayama}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 183100
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* アンツキノ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>
* アスキ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Ashitsugiyama Shrine|lt=Ashitsugiyama Shrine|qid=Q135070208|1=Ashitsugiyama Shrine}}
** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q135070210|ltq=Q135070210|qid=Q135070210|1=Ashitsugi Shrine (Bitchū Province)}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Ashitsugi Shrine|lt=Ashitsugi Shrine|qid=Q135070209|1=Ashitsugi Shrine}}
** P1352: {'amount': '+3', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}

== street address (P6375) ==
